title: Salty Zesty Egyptian Ham Flatbread
description: A fluffy, savory flatbread layered with ham, feta, apricot jam, and zesty spices for a quick weeknight Egyptian dinner.
instructions: In a bowl combine flour, salt, yeast, and ground cumin.
Add warm water and olive oil to the dry mixture and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let it rise for 30 minutes or until doubled in size.
Preheat the oven to 200C and place a baking stone or sheet inside.
Punch down the risen dough and divide it into four equal portions.
Roll each portion into a flat oval and brush the surface with honey.
Spread a thin layer of apricot jam over each flatbread and top with sliced ham and crumbled feta.
Sprinkle with oregano, pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Bake each flatbread in the preheated oven for 12 minutes or until golden and crisp.
Remove from oven and let cool for 2 minutes before slicing.
Serve the flatbread warm with a side of fresh tomato salad.
